import json
from pydantic import BaseModel


class UserResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    email: str


def serialize_user(user: UserResponse) -> str:
    data = user.model_dump()
    return json.dumps(data)


def get_user_json(user_id: int) -> str:
    user = fetch_user(user_id)
    return json.dumps(user.model_dump())


def build_api_response(items: list[UserResponse]) -> str:
    serialized = [item.model_dump() for item in items]
    return json.dumps({"items": serialized})


def export_users(users: list[UserResponse]) -> bytes:
    payload = {"users": [u.model_dump() for u in users]}
    return json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
